## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.40

### 🎥 Camera WebRTC
- Continues prerelease camera testing after reports where the camera returns an SDP answer but the peer remains stuck before the data channel opens.

### 🔎 Debug Logging
- Adds focused ICE connection, ICE gathering, signaling, and data-channel state details to camera WebRTC debug logs so follow-up reports show the transport layer that is stalling.
